title: atriplex patula var. triangularis
intro: Atriplex patula var. triangularis, also known as Four-winged Saltbush, is a shrub-like plant species in the Amaranthaceae family, characterized by its distinctive four-winged seed pods. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Atriplex patula var. triangularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote skin healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its full range of applications.
